title: AI预测权威：我还是低估了AI的速度；
description: 人工智能迭代正在打破预测极限。
titleZh: AI预测权威：我还是低估了AI的速度；
titleEn: AI Prediction Authority: I Still Underestimated the Speed of AI; Achieving "AI R&D Automation" by Year-End Is Truly Possible
descriptionZh: 人工智能迭代正在打破预测极限。
descriptionEn: AI iteration is shattering prediction limits. Impacted by the astonishing performance of Claude Opus 4.6, authoritative researcher Ajeya Cotra admitted that her predictions for AI progress in 2026 have already become obsolete ahead of schedule. The probability of achieving "AI R&D automation" by the end of this year is 10%. She stated, "I can no longer find any solid trend to assert that this won't happen soon!"
